data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. SWEET ODDS finished sixth last start, beaten 9 metres at Meadowlands over 1609m. Has the benefit of a good draw. Taking on a better line-up this time but she has the ability to mix it with them. 4. SEND IT DOWN SLIM turned in a strong effort last time over 1609m at this track, finishing 7 metres from the winner in third, adding to her impressive overall record. Tackles a similar assignment and she can take care of this line-up. 7. ALWAYSBPUFFING is the next elect off a last-start win by 3 metres at this track over 1609m. 6. ALWAYS B LAYLA showed pleasing improvement last time out when runner-up over 1609m at this track.","runners":[3,4,7,6],"exclusive":false}
